sentences.arabic: يُخَطِّطُ أَحْمَدُ لِرِحْلَةٍ سِيَاحِيَّةٍ إِلَى جِبَالِ الْأَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed planira turističko putovanje na Alpe.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed is planning a tourist trip to the Alps.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ عَبْرَ شَبَكَةِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Potražio je neophodne informacije putem interneta.
sentences.translationEn: He searched for the necessary information over the internet.

sentences.arabic: تَأَكَّدَ مِنْ حَالَةِ الطَّقْسِ لِيَخْتَارَ الْمَلَابِسَ الْمُنَاسِبَةَ لِلْبَرْدِ.
sentences.translation: Provjerio je vremensku prognozu kako bi izabrao odgovarajuću odjeću za hladnoću.
sentences.translationEn: He checked the weather conditions to choose appropriate clothing for the cold.

sentences.arabic: جَهَّزَ حَقِيبَتَهُ وَوَضَعَ فِيهَا كُلَّ مَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Pripremio je svoj kofer i u njega stavio sve što mu je potrebno.
sentences.translationEn: He prepared his suitcase and put everything he needs in it.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ مُتَحَمِّسٌ جِدًّا لِتَسَلُّقِ الْجِبَالِ وَمُمَارَسَةِ الرِّيَاضَةِ.
sentences.translation: Veoma je uzbuđen zbog planinarenja i bavljenja sportom.
sentences.translationEn: He is very excited to climb mountains and practice sports.
